name: quarterly
description: Quarterly is a desktop-first finance planner for split-month budgeting and debt payoff visibility.

scripts.dist:mac-arm64: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg zip --arm64
scripts.publish:mac-arm64: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish always --mac dmg zip --arm64
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis --x64
scripts.publish:win: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish always --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:win-portable: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win portable --x64

author: William F. Awuku Jr.
